mapper.select: select f.id,f.record_id,f.activity_id,ap.plan_name, f.rating,f.detail,f.submission_time,f.status from activity_feedback f left join activity_plan ap on f.activity_id=ap.id where f.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into activity_feedback (id,record_id, activity_id, rating, detail, submission_time, status) values (#{id},#{recordId}, #{activityId}, #{rating}, #{detail}, #{submissionTime}, #{status})
